title: MTU derivation chain undocumented and brittle
description: lora_l2.h:54, lichen_l2.h:47-48 — LICHEN_LORA_MTU=200 references SCHNORR48_SIG_LEN (48 bytes) from header not in this tree. If frame format changes, MTU must be manually updated. Derive programmatically.
close_reason: Added explicit MTU derivation constants with documentation
